form.title: Book your appointment
form.subtitle: Schedule your appointment online in a few simple steps.
form.anyProfessionalHint: We will assign the professional with an open schedule
form.pickDateHint: Choose a date to see availability.
form.noSlots: No slots available for this professional or day. Try another date.
form.notesPlaceholder: Preferences, allergies or any comments for the professional...
form.bookingError: Error completing your booking. Please try again.

success.title: Booking confirmed!
success.headline: Booking Completed!
success.fallbackMessage: Your appointment has been processed. Please contact the business to confirm.
success.defaultMessage: Your appointment has been successfully confirmed!
success.emailNote: {{message}} We sent you an email and will contact you in case of any rescheduling.

errors.load: Could not load the booking page.
errors.submit: Could not create the booking. Try again.
errors.noSlots: No available times for this date.

public.businessClosed: This business is not accepting online bookings at the moment.
public.defaultDescription: Schedule your appointment online in a few simple steps.

settings.title: Online Booking Settings
settings.subtitle: Enable public online scheduling for your clients and customize booking conditions.
settings.enableLinkHint: If disabled, your clients will not be able to book appointments on their own.
settings.yourLinkHint: Share this link on your social media (Instagram, WhatsApp) for clients to start booking appointments.
settings.downpaymentSubtitle: Require an upfront payment to secure the appointment and reduce no-shows.
settings.simActiveText: You are currently using the Mercado Pago simulation. To receive real payments in your salon bank account, go to the Integrations Center and connect your account.
settings.realActiveText: Your business can now process live deposits and receive payments automatically and securely.
settings.billingSubtitle: Set up your accounting transfer details and your Mercado Pago link. These will be automatically used in the schedule to generate WhatsApp payment messages upon completing appointments.
settings.holderPlaceholder: Full name of the account holder
settings.mpLinkHint: Optional. Mercado Pago quick payment link.
settings.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: e.g. Welcome to Aura Studio. Book your appointment by selecting the professional and the time of your choice.
settings.successMessagePlaceholder: Your appointment has been successfully confirmed!
